response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and cloud-related technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, Kubernetes, CD/CI practices), but his C++ experience is limited to a brief role at National Instruments (8 months) and some embedded work, falling short of the required 8 years. While he demonstrates leadership in mentoring and open-source projects, his lack of deep cloud architecture or large-scale infrastructure experience (especially in C++) raises concerns. However, his proven ability to drive complex projects and adopt best practices could make him a strong cultural fit.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Proven leadership in mentoring and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective)
Diverse technical background with expertise in distributed systems, cloud tooling, and scalable architectures
concerns: C++ experience is insufficient (only ~8 months) against the 8-year requirement
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture at scale
No explicit mention of leading technical strategy or architectural design for large internal platforms
